subcodes.first_line: This is the Day to arise in service, and to show servitude at the Threshold of Oneness whilst life endureth; make haste [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این یوم یوم قیام بخدمت است و عبودیت آستان احدیت تا حیات باقیست تعجیل نمائید
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the power of words; of speech, @call to action, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
